package rulecoverage

func NegativePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProduction() string {
    ruleID := "placeholder_seed_function_in_production"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Seed entrypoints in production code that are still TODO-shaped or effectively no-ops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
